response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, significant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at Naver, and deep technical versatility across cloud, data, and distributed systems — but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI solutions, vector databases, RAG architectures, or direct enterprise GenAI consulting, and his resume emphasizes breadth over depth in GenAI-specific domains.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at Naver
Proven ability to lead complex technical projects across cloud (AWS), data pipelines, and multi-language environments
Strong track record of open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops and frameworks
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years dedicated to production AI systems; most roles are general software engineering
Missing explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization metrics
Limited demonstration of customer-facing technical leadership or enterprise AI deployment consulting
